name: ImportReceiptAndCandidateOutcome
description: Durable candidate-granular recovery and terminal metadata contracts.
schema_def: ImportReceipt {receiptId, batchId, manifestRevisionId, status: approved|committing|interrupted|completed|abandoned, counts, unresolvedCandidateIds[], candidateOutcomes[], createdAt, updatedAt, completedAt?}

CandidateReceipt {candidateId, state: pending|attempting|accepted|exact_duplicate|conflicted|rejected|unresolved, attemptNumber, ledgerOperationId, ledgerContractVersion, idempotencyKey, ledgerTransactionId?, stableErrorCode?, retryDisposition, attemptedAt?, terminalAt?}
CompletedMetadataReceipt {receiptId, batchId, sourceFingerprint, selectedAccountId, adapterIdentity, versions, outcomeCounts, candidateSafeRefs[], ledgerTransactionRefs[], completedAt}

Before a LEDGER call, attempting plus the exact request/key are durable. Accepted, exact_duplicate, conflicted, and rejected are terminal; unresolved is replayable only with the frozen request/key. Completed compaction removes descriptions, amounts, balances, record text, controls, and request payloads.
